title: Magic Arsenal
content:
Extract the souls of the people you killed and store them in a fake reincarnation cycle formed by your celestial origin. Only then can you imprison them. More importantly, you must have your own mysterious space created by the celestial spell.

Immortal Emperor Bai Fan
 - 
Mysterious Soldier Realm.

Celestial Lord Qing Shui
 - 
Slaughter Realm
 also called confinement used his 
monstrous killing intent
 to restrict them, creating a Slaughter Realm. None of the people he killed could escape his control!

Thunder Celestial Wang Lin
 - 
18 Layers of Hell Reincarnation Realm
 form using Life and Death Dao Underworld River and the 
Celestial Sealing Stamp
 to form his own reincarnation cycle.
